title: RCAN Compatibility Matrix — version tuple PAYLOAD (single project assertion)
description: Inner payload of a per-project signed assertion. Wrapped by version-tuple-envelope.json. Aggregated daily into the compatibility matrix at /v2/compatibility-matrix.

project.description: Stable project slug, e.g. 'robot-md', 'rcan-py', 'opencastor'. Resolves to a RAN via opencastor-ops/config/repos.json.

matrix_version.description: Version of the matrix schema this tuple targets.

field.description: Which row in the canonical tuple this assertion populates.

value.description: Asserted value. Semver for code projects; profile string for protocol/cert.

depends_on.description: Range constraints this release expects of other rows.
